nasb.text: And he lifted up his eyes and saw the traveler in the open square of the city; and the old man said, “Where are you going, and where do you come from?”

esv.text: And he lifted up his eyes and saw the traveler in the open square of the city. And the old man said, “Where are you going? And where do you come from?”

cnv.text: 那老年人舉目，看見那個旅客在城裡的廣場上，就問他：“你要到哪裡去？你從哪裡來？”

ccb.text: 他看见有人在城中的广场露宿，就问：“你们从哪里来，要到哪里去？”
